questions.photoDescription: A woman in business attire is sitting at a desk, typing on a laptop while a smartphone is placed next to her on the desk.

options.A: She is writing notes on a piece of paper.
options.B: She is typing on her laptop at the desk.
options.C: She is talking on the smartphone.
options.D: She is organizing papers in a folder.

questions.explanation: The woman's hands are on the laptop keyboard, indicating she is typing.

questions.photoDescription: Two men are standing around a white table in a conference room, looking at documents spread across the table. One man is pointing at a document.

options.A: They are cleaning the conference table.
options.B: They are having a discussion over documents.
options.C: They are setting up equipment for a presentation.
options.D: They are waiting for a meeting to begin.

questions.explanation: Both men are looking at the documents, and one is pointing, indicating they are reviewing materials together.

audioSegments.text: Look at the picture marked number 1 in your test book.
(A) She is writing notes on a piece of paper.
(B) She is typing on her laptop at the desk.
(C) She is talking on the smartphone.
(D) She is organizing papers in a folder.
Look at the picture marked number 2 in your test book.
(A) They are cleaning the conference table.
(B) They are having a discussion over documents.
(C) They are setting up equipment for a presentation.
(D) They are waiting for a meeting to begin.
